qa_matrix.question_text: Member Name
Member Date of Birth
ID Proof PAN
Education Qualification
Your current Occupation
Kindly share your current location( City and state with country)?
Sir/Mam' are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.
qa_matrix.expected_response: You Chirag Manjibhai Sonani , declare that, you have fully understood the questions asked to you as per this call and have furnished complete, true and accurate information after fully understanding the same. Sir/Mam' are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.

qa_matrix.question_text: In the last 24 months, have you smoked or used any tobacco or nicotine products?
Do you consume alcohol ?
Have you ever been advised by a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol consumption ?
Have you ever used recreational drugs or Narcotics that was not prescribed by a Licensed physician ?
What is Proposed insured height (cm)?
What is Proposed Insured weight (kg)?
High/Low blood pressure, raised cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids

Chest pain or heaviness or discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, Heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath or any other heart conditions
Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sacroma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths
Diabetes, raised blood sugar or sugar in urine,Hyperthyroidism, Hypothyroidism , other thyroid disorders, or any other endocrine disorders
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, I don't have that. Just normal sugar.

qa_matrix.question_text: Are you on treatment prescribed by your doctor?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, medication. Primary medications are ongoing.

qa_matrix.question_text: How long have you had diabetes? Please enter in years.
Are you on regular (at least 3 monthly) follow-up with a doctor?
Have you had an HBA1c blood test done in the last 6 months?

Have you ever suffered from any complication such as diabetic coma, heart disease, stroke, kidney impairment, circulation problem, vascular disease, gangrene, eye or vision problems, protein in urine?
Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease (COPD) or any other respiratory disorders
Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other diseases or disorders of the liver
Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus or any other diseases or disorders of the blood or autoimmune disease

Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack (TIA), multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, Dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous, mental health disorders?

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcera-tive colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders

Kidney stones, gall stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hydrocele or any other disorders of the kidney, bladder, genital, prostate or urinary systems?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, no, madam, I don't have any disease.

qa_matrix.question_text: Recurrent Back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bones, joints, limbs or spine?
Blindness,cataracts, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other diseases or disorders of eyes
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swal-lowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

Is there anything else that you would like to share with us with respect to your health/ habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts & information?
qa_matrix.captured_response: No, madam, fitness is perfectly fine.

qa_matrix.question_text: a)Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or pre-scribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endo-scopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test

typo_in_expected_response.corrected_text: prescribed medical tests such as imaging scan reports (e.g. x-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan etc.), biopsy, electrocardiogram (ECG), treadmill, Mammography, Endoscopy/Colonoscopy, PAP Smear, blood or urine test

qa_matrix.question_text: b) Medication or treatment that lasted more than 2 weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment/consultation and/or investigations (eg: Blood, ECG, MRI, Xray etc)
c) Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two 2 consecutive weeks at a time
Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down's syndrome, poliomyelitis
Have you or your spouse or partner been told to undergo tests or treatment, or received any medical advice or counselling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases, including HIV and AIDS?

Apart from what you have disclosed, are you experiencing any unexplained weight loss/gain or any sign/symptoms that you are likely to seek medical advice or treatment for or awaiting any surgical procedure.

critical_issues: The customer's Date of Birth (12-10-1994) provided in the conversation does not match the MER (14-Aug-1985).
The PAN card number provided by the customer (B M Z F D 9558) does not match the MER (BNJPS9558J).
The MER incorrectly states 'No' for 'Are you on treatment prescribed by your doctor?' for diabetes, despite the customer confirming 'Primary medications are ongoing'.

The MER incorrectly states 'No' for 'Medication or treatment that lasted more than 2 weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor', despite the customer being on diabetes medication for 4 years and having regular follow-ups.
The doctor missed asking a mandatory question from the MER: 'Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down's syndrome, poliomyelitis'.
recommendations: The doctor should meticulously verify and confirm all personal particulars, especially Date of Birth and ID proof details, to ensure they accurately match the MER.
The doctor must ensure accurate capture of information regarding ongoing medical treatments and consultations, particularly for chronic conditions like diabetes, to avoid discrepancies with the MER.
The doctor should ensure all mandatory questions from the MER documentation are explicitly asked during the conversation.
The doctor should ensure all components of a question, such as city, state, and country for location, are fully captured from the customer's response.

customer_satisfaction_indicators: Customer is cooperative and responsive to questions.
Customer expresses gratitude at the end of the call ('Thank you').

validation_errors: Customer's Date of Birth (12-10-1994) differs from MER (14-Aug-1985).
Customer's PAN card number (B M Z F D 9558) differs from MER (BNJPS9558J).
MER states 'No' for diabetes treatment, but customer confirms 'medications are ongoing'.
MER states 'No' for treatment lasting more than 2 weeks/specialist consultation, but customer is on diabetes medication for 4 years and has regular follow-ups.

meta.insurance_company: Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Ltd.
